name: arxxis-director-studio
description: ARXXIS Director Studio — Project Director + Audio Studio

scripts.audit:speed: npx @google/gemini-cli --file src/views/ProjectDirectorView.tsx 'Audit this for React re-render bottlenecks, O(n) complexity in scene processing, and redundant state updates. Suggest useMemo/useCallback where applicable.'
scripts.audit:backend: npx @google/gemini-cli --file server/index.js 'Analyze for expensive synchronous fs operations and suggest async alternatives or caching strategies for project metadata.'
scripts.audit:staged: git diff --cached | npx @google/gemini-cli 'Review these staged changes for performance regressions and adherence to the Two-Pass architecture rules.'
